---
title: "QC"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---



```{python}
import pandas as pd
import anndata as ad
import numpy as np
import scanpy as sc
import pickle as pkl

from pydeseq2.dds import DeseqDataSet

from itables import show
from IPython.display import display, Markdown
from utils import plot_mean_over_variance, plot_sample_distance_heatmap, plot_raw_vs_normed_counts, pca_from_adata, plot_pca_plotly
```



```{python}
with open("../results/models/model_~condition.pkl",'rb') as f:
    adata = pkl.load(f)
```

```{python}
raw_data = pd.DataFrame(
    adata.X.T,
    index=adata.var.index,
    columns=adata.obs.index
)

# Insert gene_name as FIRST column
raw_data.insert(0, "gene_name", adata.var.loc[raw_data.index, "gene_name"])
```

## Data

::: panel-tabset
## Meta Data
```{python}
show(adata.obs,maxBytes=0)
```

## Raw data
```{python}
#| column: page
show(raw_data,maxBytes=0)
```
:::

## plots

### mean over variance

```{python}
#| column: page-inset-right
plot_mean_over_variance(adata)
```

### Dispersion

```{python}
adata.plot_dispersions()
```


### Boxplots
```{python}
sc.tl.pca(adata,layer='vst_counts')
adata.layers['raw_counts'] = adata.X.copy()
adata.X = adata.layers['vst_counts']
sc.pp.neighbors(adata)
sc.tl.umap(adata)
```

```{python}
#| column: page
plot_raw_vs_normed_counts(adata=adata,figsize=(12,8))
```

### clustermap

```{python}
#| column: page-inset-right
plot_sample_distance_heatmap(adata,layer='vst_counts')
```


### PCA All genes

::: panel-tabset
```{python}
#| output: asis

for col in adata.obs.columns.unique():
    display(Markdown(f"## {col}"))
    sc.pl.pca(adata,color=col,size=150,annotate_var_explained=True)
    display(Markdown(f" "))
```
:::
### UMAP

::: panel-tabset
```{python}
#| output: asis

for col in adata.obs.columns.unique():
    display(Markdown(f"## {col}"))
    sc.pl.umap(adata,color=col,size=150)
    display(Markdown(f" "))
```
:::

### PCA top 1000 genes

```{python}
sc.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata,n_top_genes=1000,layer='vst_counts')
sc.pp.pca(adata,layer='vst_counts')
```
```{python}
#| column: page
pca_data,var = pca_from_adata(adata)
plot_pca_plotly(pca_data,var,title='')
```
